channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Outbound will launch earlier than planned because of Subnautica 2
item.content:encoded:
It was only a few weeks ago that Outbound was been delayed to May 14th by Square Glade Games, after an issue meant it would not release on April 23rd. Now, an external issue has impacted the release date of Outbound, but in a more positive way. Because Subnautica 2 Early Access now has a release date set for May 14th, Square Glade Games has decided to move the Outbound release date forward to May 11th to avoid a clash. However, the PS5 and Switch releases will stay at May 14th.

In a statement, Square Glade Games wrote, “The highly anticipated title Subnautica 2 just revealed their release date – which falls exactly on our planned release date May 14th. Even though we are very hyped for their game and big fans of the franchise, we think that it is best to not compete with such an highly anticipated title on that day. We need to dodge the Leviathan, which means that you can start your road trip on earlier! With Subnautica 2 launching on May 14th on Steam and Xbox, Outbound will now release earlier on May 11th on Steam, Epic Games Store, and Xbox – with the other consoles following on May 14th! Please note that this change means, that the demo will go offline on May 8th.”

In Outbound, you explore a cosy near utopian world in your camper, which can be upgraded with different items to make the journey as comfortable as possible. You will be able to adopt a pet to join you on your road trip, and Outbound also supports four player co-op so you can go on a road trip with others. Outbound will be released on PC, PS5, Xbox Series XS, Switch and Switch 2.

Source: Steam



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/05/01/outbound-will-launch-earlier-than-planned-because-of-subnautica-2/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Subnautica 2 Early Access release date set for May 14th
item.content:encoded:
It has taken a while to get here, but Unknown Worlds has confirmed that Subnautica 2 will launch into Steam Early Access on May 14th, so it is less than two weeks away. The studio also confirmed that Subnautica 2 Early Access will launch at a price of $29.99 and that price will include every update and the eventual 1.0 release.

Behind the scenes, there has been quite a lot of drama at Unknown Worlds when the original co-founders were ousted by publisher Krafton over a $250 million bonus, with accusations the publisher had used an AI chatbot to find a way to get out of paying. A lawsuit was filed for wrongful termination with the judge siding with Max McGuire and Ted Gill, the Unknown Worlds founders and ordering their reinstatement. Let’s hope for calmer waters ahead.

In our Subnautica review, Rebecca said, “Subnautica is a perfect example an open world survival game that doesn’t rely on action, horror or combat elements to excite. Whilst these classic gaming features are involved to an extent, they take a back seat compared to the story, crafting and surviving elements. And this is what sets Subnautica apart from other survival experiences out there. Don’t let this be the one that got away.”

Source: Steam



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/05/01/subnautica-2-early-access-release-date-set-for-may-14th/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
